reviews.review_description: I don’t understand why people are griping about this game. It’s very well done, funny, and a lot of fun. Part of the challenge is figuring out the best character/weapons/abilities to use for a particular situation. At one point I was frustrated because I couldn’t figure out how to do something, but then I realized the clues were right there on the screen for me to figure it out. Once I did, I appreciated the clever way this game works. I like not being given a step-by-step “how to win the game” set of instructions.
A good game but some of the missions are a bit weird

I really enjoyed this title. It is a little too original for its own good. There are a few play modes that aren't great and the worst level is the first one. However, there is more originality, depth, and fun here to be had than almost any other game for the Go.

Idk why people are giving this a low rating. Once you're used to what each of your team does, the game is awesome. Definitely challenging, too! Probably put about 6 hours in it so far in the two days I've had it downloaded.  Great mix of running games, shooting and minigames. Pro tip: make sure you read ALL the instructions.

Controls are terrible with the Oculus Go controller, can't even select the characters properly. 
Tutorials never explain how each character works. 
Guess what, the first stage is a slow af Temper Run clone and I got stuck on it. Had to end up Googling and find out you had to HOLD the trigger button. Nowhere was this stated ingame. 
None of the other stages tells you how the controls work. 

Save your money and don't bother with this, games are suppose to be fun, instead this will only frustrate you.
fun but i can t passed the  mission when 4 soldiers are in a fields and To disarm them
This is a really fun game, very humerous. I would like to see it expanded even more.

reviews.review_title: Another great title from Twisted Pixel
reviews.review_description: I’ve followed this developer for a long time. This game is polished and fun to play. There are a few moments where things will hitch a bit but overall it is a good performing game. It’s a little temple run and shooting gallery. Great fun on the Go!

This game is just what I want from a mobile vr game. I think people get discouraged by the first level. Stick with it though all levels after the first one get much better. Yes it’s a wave shooter but with strategy.  Don’t give up like I almost did. onceL you Learn what each character does it’s very fun!

reviews.review_title: Excellent stand out game on the oculus g
reviews.review_description: I did a review on this game on my channel YouTube.com/UrGamingTechie In short this has a lot of varied tasks you do during the game that always keeps things fresh. Great graphics as well. Check it out

I really looked forward to play this game. I have a samsung galaxy S9. When the game launches, the start game button is missing. If I press where it should be, I enter the game. But then all the NPC PC-screens are black for some reason. I can click, but its impossible without the mission numbers etc.
really hope you can fix this in a future patch.
The game is pretty standard. Some good missions and others lackluster. The worst part is there isn’t much to help you get started. More instructions would be nice and helpful.
I had to go on YouTube to figure out how to play your game

4 different character with different abilities + 2 different game modes ( running & shooting). Really enjoying gameplay. Very funny. Plus, has game visuals & sounds rewards (for customizations). Thanks!

So this game is alot of fun i detest games forcing me to use this awkward go controller but this one does it right its hard as balls sometimes but never cheap and you often dont have to replay much WHEN you die lol good work

It starts with a sh*tty TempleRun game mode and then you understand you got scamed ; and instead of a fps games, you end with a mixed bastardised game with barely any explaination and how to achieve the very first stage, despite humourus but useless presentation. It's waste of money. Stay away.
The tutorial definitely needs some help as the game is confusing at first. Once you get the hang of it though it is actually a lot of fun.
